scripts.postbuild: npm run generate-sitemap && cp _redirects dist/_redirects && cp site.webmanifest dist/site.webmanifest && mkdir -p dist/assets/images/works--low dist/assets/images/works--high dist/js dist/styles && cp -R public/assets/images/works--low/* dist/assets/images/works--low/ && cp -R public/assets/images/works/* dist/assets/images/works--high/ && cp src/assets/Another-Studio-Credentials.pdf dist/assets/ && cp src/js/flickity.js dist/js/flickity.js && cp src/styles/flickity.css dist/styles/flickity.css && cp public/robots.txt dist/robots.txt
